violations.text: The prep unit located in the cookline area was observed in need of further repair. (maintaining an ambient temperature of 49 degrees Fahrenheit). Unit was not in use for storage of TCS Foods at time of inspection. Unit is no to be used for cold holding until serviced/repaired and maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Snail and cheese was observed held at 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit in the flip top prep unit overnight. Ambient temperature of the prep unit observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The prep unit located in the cookline area was not in good repair (maintaining 44 degrees Fahrenheit). New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
